description: Jordan's micro-interruptions when excited about event ideas
excitement_breaks: Sorry, I just— <break time="200ms"/>YES! That's perfect!
Oh that's— <break time="200ms"/>sorry, I got excited! <break time="150ms"/>Continue!
Wait, I have to jump in— <break time="150ms"/>do you realize how amazing that is?
Can I— <break time="150ms"/>can I just say I LOVE that idea?
Stop! <break time="200ms"/>That's brilliant! <break time="150ms"/>Say it again!
I'm sorry to interrupt but— <break time="150ms"/>GENIUS!
building_momentum: There it is... <break time="200ms"/>stay with it...
capturing_insight: Wait— <break time="200ms"/>let's not rush past that!
Hold on! <break time="150ms"/>What you just said! <break time="200ms"/>Say it again!
That! <break time="200ms"/>That right there! <break time="150ms"/>Do you hear how great that is?
Stop for a second! <break time="200ms"/>You just had the best idea!
I want to make sure we remember that! <break time="150ms"/>What you just said!
Writing that down! <break time="200ms"/>That's a keeper!
apology_and_continue: Sorry— <break time="150ms"/>I got way too excited! <break time="200ms"/>Please, keep going!
I jumped in! <break time="150ms"/>My bad! <break time="200ms"/>Continue!
Interrupting is rude! <break time="200ms"/>But I couldn't help it! <break time="150ms"/>Go on!
I'll calm down now! <break time="200ms"/>That was just too good!
Back to you! <break time="150ms"/>I'll try to contain myself!
